Class SamlResponseValidator

java.lang.Object
iu.saml.SamlResponseValidator
class SamlResponseValidator extends Object
Encapsulates interactions with OpenSAML for handling IDP-issued responses.

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • SamlResponseValidator

      SamlResponseValidator(URI postUri, String entityId, String sessionId, InetAddress remoteAddr, IuSamlServiceProviderMetadata config, org.opensaml.xmlsec.signature.support.impl.ExplicitKeySignatureTrustEngine trustEngine)
      Constructor
      Parameters:
      postUri - HTTP POST binding URI
      entityId - IDP entity ID
      sessionId - expected session ID
      remoteAddr - remote address
      config - supplies IuSamlServiceProviderMetadata
      trustEngine - trust engine for verifying response and assertion signatures

  • Method Details

    • createAssertionValidator

      static org.opensaml.saml.saml2.assertion.SAML20AssertionValidator createAssertionValidator(org.opensaml.saml.security.impl.SAMLSignatureProfileValidator signatureProfileValidator, org.opensaml.xmlsec.signature.support.impl.ExplicitKeySignatureTrustEngine trustEngine, IuSubjectConfirmationValidator subjectConfirmationValidator)
      Creates an SAML20AssertionValidator
      Parameters:
      signatureProfileValidator - SAMLSignatureProfileValidator
      trustEngine - ExplicitKeySignatureTrustEngine
      subjectConfirmationValidator - IuSubjectConfirmationValidator
      Returns:
      SAML20AssertionValidator

    • createValidationContext

      static org.opensaml.saml.common.assertion.ValidationContext createValidationContext(String spEntityId, String sessionId, URI postUri, InetAddress remoteAddr, Iterable<String> validIssuers)
      Creates ValidationContext from static parameters.
      Parameters:
      spEntityId - service provider entity ID
      sessionId - expected session ID
      postUri - HTTP POST binding URI
      remoteAddr - remote address
      validIssuers - valid IDP entity IDs
      Returns:
      ValidationContext

    • getDecrypter

      static org.opensaml.saml.saml2.encryption.Decrypter getDecrypter(edu.iu.crypt.WebKey identity)
      Gets a Decrypter for deciphering encrypted SAML Response and Assertion content.
      Parameters:
      identity - SAML SP WebKey
      Returns:
      Decrypter

    • validate

      SamlPrincipal validate(org.opensaml.saml.saml2.core.Response response) throws Exception
      Validates a parsed SAML response (entry point).
      Parameters:
      response - parsed SAML response
      Returns:
      Verified SamlPrincipal if the response and signature are valid, subject confirmation verification checks pass, and the response contains at least one potentially encrypted assertion that includes an authentication statement, conditions, and principal name attribute
      Throws:
      Exception - if any verification steps fail

    • validateSignature

      void validateSignature(org.opensaml.saml.saml2.core.Response response) throws org.opensaml.security.SecurityException, org.opensaml.xmlsec.signature.support.SignatureException
      Validates the signature of a response
      Parameters:
      response - Response
      Throws:
      org.opensaml.security.SecurityException - from trustEngine
      org.opensaml.xmlsec.signature.support.SignatureException - from signatureProfileValidator

    • validateAssertions

      Iterable<edu.iu.saml.IuSamlAssertion> validateAssertions(org.opensaml.saml.saml2.core.Response response) throws Exception
      Validates potentially encrypted SAML assertions from a response
      Parameters:
      response - Response
      Returns:
      At least one SamlAssertion
      Throws:
      Exception - if an assertion fails to validate

    • verifySubjectConfirmation

      void verifySubjectConfirmation()
      Verifies that previous validation activities provided a confirmed subject confirmation.
